summary: Website for browsing educational/useful event photos and allowing users to submit events to be displayed, with a transparent-text review overlay on event photos.

existing_features.title: Implement a frontend events gallery page that displays submitted educational/useful events as a list/grid of event photo cards; each card must show the event photo and include the event’s review rendered with transparent text styling so the photo is visible behind the text, matching the user’s request.

Implement a frontend event submission flow: add an “Submit Event” form that allows a user to enter event title, description, optional date, optional location, review text, and upload an image; on submission, the event is sent to the backend and then appears in the gallery.

Define and apply a cohesive visual theme for the site (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) appropriate for “educational and useful events”; enforce the theme across the gallery and submission views using Tailwind styling and existing UI component primitives, avoiding blue/purple as the primary palette.

new_feature_requests.summary: Event listings/gallery page to view events with associated photos (educational/useful events focus)
User event submission form to submit new events (including photo) for display on the website
Display a review next to/on each event photo with transparent text overlay so the photo remains visible behind the text

Create a backend data model and API to store and retrieve educational/useful events that include an image and a review string: each event must have a unique id, title, description, optional date, optional location, image bytes + image MIME type, review text, and createdAt timestamp; provide methods to (1) create/submit an event and (2) list all events for display.

projectName: Educational Events Gallery with Submissions and Transparent Review Overlay
